verdict: SIGNAL DETECTED so far: positive abnormal returns with |t|≥2; strongest at +5d. Still a statistical tendency — validate before any real use.
method: Entry = filing-date close (what a follower gets). Abnormal = stock − SPY. Horizons in trading days. Immature events excluded per-horizon. Hygiene: 15 sub-$1 events and 2 split/data-glitch events excluded.
